prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Flashing & WRB integration, part of the Carpentry & Finishes scope. The observed field condition is: tape sequence wrong at sill. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: IRC R703, mfr instructions.
title: Identification: Flashing & WRB integration (residential job)
